channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Your youngest employees may be your most valuable AI teachers
item.description: Senior leaders still hold experience and judgment, but younger employees increasingly hold the practical AI skills transforming work. I’ve built leadership programs at Amazon, Microsoft, and other companies. One mistake I often see is thinking that knowledge flows only from the top down. Senior leaders teach, junior employees learn, and expertise moves in just one direction....

item.title: How do you find a job that will make you happy?
item.description: Research suggests that lasting job satisfaction comes less from daily happiness than from meaningful work, personal growth, and a sense of control. If you work full-time, a significant chunk of your week is bound up with your work life. Not only are you engaged eight or more hours a day, but you’re likely to think about things going on at work even when you’re doing other things. So, while your job doesn’t need to be your primary source of life satisfaction, you will be happier overall if your job is one that you find fulfilling....

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for June 20, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on June 20
item.description: See the Moon phase expected for June 20, 2026 as well as when the next Full Moon is expected.
